_comment: route-on-touch table. The PreToolUse hook matches the file being edited against these globs and injects `hint` as additionalContext (reference guidance, NOT imperative commands — see docs/SPIKE-0.1). `skills` names the skill(s) whose patterns apply; alwaysLoad applies to every edit.

routes.hint: tRPC ROUTE file. Keep it thin: validate input with a Zod schema, delegate the work to the matching controller in trpc/controllers/, and throw a typed TRPCError on failure. A new/changed procedure usually also needs a controller and a shared type in libs/admin-types. Patterns: admin-routing + admin-api-design.

tRPC CONTROLLER file. Use the axiosRequest util + envConfig, extract the token, log via Winston (never console.log), and surface upstream failures as typed TRPCError. Patterns: admin-api-design + admin-services.
Redis/cache file. Follow the key-naming + TTL + invalidation patterns; caching must be non-fatal (degrade gracefully). Patterns: admin-caching.
Backend service/util file. RabbitMQ is non-fatal at startup (check connection first). Centralize config via envConfig; log via Winston. Patterns: admin-services.

React component (MUI + tss-react). Arrow function + inline destructured props + default export (see admin-conventions). Handle errors via the snackbar/error patterns. For any visual/design work follow standards/design.md — match the existing app's components first, then Anthropic frontend-design + brand tokens; never a one-off look. Patterns: admin-components + admin-errors.
Form code. Use react-hook-form + Zod resolver, field-key enums, and the project's Controller field components. Patterns: admin-forms.
Redux Toolkit state. Use createSlice, typed hooks, and (where relevant) redux-persist and tRPC invalidation. Hooks use named exports (see admin-conventions). Patterns: admin-state.
SHARED types — the FE/BE contract. Define the type here and re-export from libs/admin-types/src/index.ts; never duplicate a type locally in an app. Both sides consume it via @admin-types.
Test file (vitest + RTL). Read the implementation first, then test behavior. Backend specs live as *.spec.ts under src/. Patterns: admin-testing.

_notes: On an unmapped path the hook emits a `router-miss: <path>` marker that validate.mjs surfaces in the PR body — every miss is audited and grows the table.
